hooks.command: cd /home/ec2-user/otel 2>/dev/null || exit 0; if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git add -A 2>/dev/null; git commit -q -m "Otomatik yedek: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" 2>/dev/null; fi; if git rev-parse origin/master >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "$(git log origin/master..master --oneline 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git push -q origin master 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
